name: Eggnog Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 package {4-serving size} Jell-O® Vanilla Flavor (Instant Pudding & Pie Filling)
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour the milk into a medium bowl.
2. Add the pudding mix, rum extract, and nutmeg to the bowl with the milk.
3. Beat the mixture with a wire whisk for 2 minutes until smooth.
4. Transfer the pudding into dessert glasses.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
